summary.en: EMC Directive 2014/30/EU requires heat pumps to comply with electromagnetic emission limits. Harmonised standard EN 55014-1:2021 (Electromagnetic compatibility — Requirements for household appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus — Part 1: Emission) specifies conducted and radiated emission limits. Heat pump compressors, motors, and inverter drives are significant emission sources covered by this standard.
summary.zh: 电磁兼容指令2014/30/EU要求热泵满足电磁发射限值要求。协调标准EN 55014-1:2021（电磁兼容——家用电器、电动工具和类似器具的要求——第1部分：发射）规定了传导和辐射发射限值。热泵压缩机、电机和变频器驱动是该标准所涵盖的重要发射源。
summary.zht: 電磁相容指令2014/30/EU要求熱泵滿足電磁發射限值要求。協調標準EN 55014-1:2021（電磁相容——家用電器、電動工具和類似器具的要求——第1部分：發射）規定了傳導和輻射發射限值。熱泵壓縮機、電機和變頻器驅動是該標準所涵蓋的重要發射源。

summary.en: GB 4343.1-2018 (Electromagnetic disturbance characteristics of household electrical appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus — Part 1: Emission) is China's national adoption of CISPR 14-1. EMC emission testing is included under CCC certification for domestic appliances, conducted at CNAS/CMA accredited laboratories.
summary.zh: GB 4343.1-2018（家用电器、电动工具和类似器具的电磁骚扰特性——第1部分：发射）是中国对CISPR 14-1的国家采标。电磁发射测试纳入家用电器CCC认证范围，由CNAS/CMA认可实验室进行。
summary.zht: GB 4343.1-2018（家用電器、電動工具和類似器具的電磁騷擾特性——第1部分：發射）是中國對CISPR 14-1的國家採標。電磁發射測試納入家用電器CCC認證範圍，由CNAS/CMA認可實驗室進行。

gap.en: Although GB 4343.1-2018 and EN 55014-1:2021 share a common CISPR 14-1 lineage, Chinese CCC test reports under GB 4343.1 are not accepted as evidence of EU EMC Directive conformity. Re-testing to EN 55014-1:2021 at an EU-recognised laboratory is required, along with a new EU Declaration of Conformity.
gap.zh: 尽管GB 4343.1-2018和EN 55014-1:2021同源于CISPR 14-1，但基于GB 4343.1的中国CCC测试报告不被接受为欧盟EMC指令合规证明。需在欧盟认可实验室按EN 55014-1:2021重新测试，并出具新的欧盟符合性声明。
gap.zht: 儘管GB 4343.1-2018和EN 55014-1:2021同源於CISPR 14-1，但基於GB 4343.1的中國CCC測試報告不被接受為歐盟EMC指令合規證明。需在歐盟認可實驗室按EN 55014-1:2021重新測試，並出具新的歐盟符合性聲明。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory (EU EMC Directive CE marking required)
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (CCC certification includes EMC emission testing)

source.publisher: EUR-Lex / Official Journal of the European Union

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Gap — re-testing to EN 55014-1:2021 required; GB 4343.1 CCC test reports not accepted as EU EMC Directive conformity evidence.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 存在差距——需按EN 55014-1:2021重新测试；GB 4343.1 CCC测试报告不被接受为欧盟EMC指令合规证明。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 存在差距——需按EN 55014-1:2021重新測試；GB 4343.1 CCC測試報告不被接受為歐盟EMC指令合規證明。

requirement_topic.en: EMC — Immunity and Power Quality (EN 55014-2 / EN 61000 Series)
requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容——抗扰度与电能质量（EN 55014-2 / EN 61000系列）
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容——抗擾度與電能品質（EN 55014-2 / EN 61000系列）

summary.en: EMC Directive 2014/30/EU covers immunity as well as emissions. EN 55014-2:2021 specifies immunity requirements for household appliances. EN 61000-3-2 limits harmonic currents injected into the public supply network. EN 61000-3-3 limits voltage fluctuations and flicker. Conformity assessment is via manufacturer self-declaration with a Technical File (Annex II of the EMC Directive); no third-party body is mandatory, but test evidence must be retained.
summary.zh: 电磁兼容指令2014/30/EU同时涵盖抗扰度和发射。EN 55014-2:2021规定家用电器的抗扰度要求。EN 61000-3-2限制注入公共电网的谐波电流。EN 61000-3-3限制电压波动和闪烁。合规评估通过制造商自我声明并附技术文件（EMC指令附件II）进行；无强制第三方机构要求，但须保存测试证据。
summary.zht: 電磁相容指令2014/30/EU同時涵蓋抗擾度和發射。EN 55014-2:2021規定家用電器的抗擾度要求。EN 61000-3-2限制注入公共電網的諧波電流。EN 61000-3-3限制電壓波動和閃爍。合規評估通過製造商自我聲明並附技術文件（EMC指令附件II）進行；無強制第三方機構要求，但須保存測試證據。

summary.en: GB/T 17625.1 (harmonic current emissions — national adoption of IEC 61000-3-2), GB/T 17625.2 (voltage fluctuations — national adoption of IEC 61000-3-3), and GB/T 4343.2-2020 (immunity — adoption of CISPR 14-2) are the Chinese equivalents. These share IEC/CISPR lineage with the EU harmonised standards but Chinese test reports are not accepted for EU market conformity.
summary.zh: GB/T 17625.1（谐波电流发射——IEC 61000-3-2国家采标）、GB/T 17625.2（电压波动——IEC 61000-3-3国家采标）和GB/T 4343.2-2020（抗扰度——CISPR 14-2采标）是对应的中国标准。这些标准与欧盟协调标准同源于IEC/CISPR，但中国测试报告不被接受用于欧盟市场合规。
summary.zht: GB/T 17625.1（諧波電流發射——IEC 61000-3-2國家採標）、GB/T 17625.2（電壓波動——IEC 61000-3-3國家採標）和GB/T 4343.2-2020（抗擾度——CISPR 14-2採標）是對應的中國標準。這些標準與歐盟協調標準同源於IEC/CISPR，但中國測試報告不被接受用於歐盟市場合規。

gap.en: Separate EU conformity assessment is required. Existing Chinese immunity and power-quality test reports do not substitute for EU Technical File evidence. A new EU Declaration of Conformity must be issued covering all applicable EMC Directive requirements.
gap.zh: 需要独立的欧盟合规评估。现有中国抗扰度和电能质量测试报告不能替代欧盟技术文件证据。须出具涵盖所有适用EMC指令要求的新欧盟符合性声明。
gap.zht: 需要獨立的歐盟合規評估。現有中國抗擾度和電能品質測試報告不能替代歐盟技術文件證據。須出具涵蓋所有適用EMC指令要求的新歐盟符合性聲明。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory (EU EMC Directive CE marking required; self-declaration with Technical File)

source.publisher: EUR-Lex / Official Journal of the European Union

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Gap — separate EU conformity assessment required; existing Chinese test reports do not substitute for EU EMC Directive Technical File evidence.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 存在差距——需要独立的欧盟合规评估；现有中国测试报告不能替代欧盟EMC指令技术文件证据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 存在差距——需要獨立的歐盟合規評估；現有中國測試報告不能替代歐盟EMC指令技術文件證據。
